newClaims.quote: The Gerstner Sloan Kettering Graduate School of Biomedical Sciences trains laboratory scientists and engineers to work in research areas related to human disease, with a focus on cancer.

newClaims.limitations: PhD biomedical science graduate school — not a clinical medical-student or physician training pathway.

newClaims.quote:
Tri-Institutional PhD Program in Computational Biology and Medicine
The Tri-Institutional Program in Computational Biology and Medicine is a collaborative effort between Memorial Sloan Kettering, Cornell University in Ithaca, and Weill Cornell Medical College.

newClaims.limitations: PhD program — not a clinical USCE pathway.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: PhD graduate program for computational biology research — outside the physician pipeline.

newClaims.quote:
Tri-Institutional PhD Program in Chemical Biology
The Tri-Institutional PhD Program in Chemical Biology is a joint graduate program offered by Memorial Sloan Kettering, Weill Cornell Medical College, and The Rockefeller University that trains students to use chemical approaches to address problems at the forefront of biomedical research.

newClaims.limitations: PhD program — not a clinical USCE pathway.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: PhD graduate program in chemical biology — outside the physician pipeline.

newClaims.quote:
Weill Cornell Graduate School of Medical Sciences
A collaboration between the Weill Cornell Medical College and the Sloan Kettering Institute, this school trains future generations of biomedical researchers.

newClaims.limitations: Biomedical research graduate school — not a clinical USCE pathway.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Biomedical research graduate school — outside the physician pipeline.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the MD/PhD but did not emit the standalone Weill Cornell GSMS joint program.

newClaims.quote: The MSK Bridge program aims to provide post-baccalaureate trainees from traditionally underrepresented groups with a strong foundation in science and research, as well as guided mentoring that will help them successfully transition into biomedical PhD programs.

tier3.quote: Each year, the Office of Science, Education, and Training hosts a recruitment event for potential postdoctoral fellows from underrepresented groups, called MSK View .
tier3.claimText: MSK View — annual postdoctoral recruitment event for underrepresented groups.
tier3.limitations: Postdoctoral recruitment event — not a clinical USCE pathway.
tier3.tierAssignmentRationale: Postdoctoral recruitment activity — Tier 3 research career resource.
tier3.whyA1Missed: A1 did not surface this named annual recruitment event.
